name: gam-monorepo
description: GAM - Monorepo with backstage and user-web applications

scripts.build: yarn workspace @gam/backstage build && yarn workspace @gam/user-web build
scripts.lint: yarn workspace @gam/backstage lint && yarn workspace @gam/user-web lint
scripts.lint:fix: yarn workspace @gam/backstage lint:fix && yarn workspace @gam/user-web lint:fix
scripts.test: yarn workspace @gam/backstage test && yarn workspace @gam/user-web test
